description: Mock replaces behavior under test - internal domain function
code:
def test_mock_internal_calculator():
    # Mock replaces the domain logic under test
    mock_calc = Mock(spec=Calculator)
    mock_calc.add.return_value = 5  # Fake result
    # The add method IS the behavior being tested
    result = mock_calc.add(2, 3)
    assert result == 5  # Asserting mock's return value
